run_description: Same 26-week window, but with 4 temporal features wired in (customer recency/cadence/30d-frequency, article 30d recency-weighted popularity). Reconstructed from chat transcript for the same reason as 26week_30epoch_no_temporal.json. This run is what led to dropping the temporal features -- it peaked at epoch 5 and never improved further, while the no-temporal-features run kept climbing the whole way to epoch 30.

temporal_feature_list: customer_idx_days_since_prev (recency, collapsed to only 3 buckets due to same-day multi-item baskets)

conclusion: Temporal features capped performance rather than just being neutral -- ruled out the 'needs more epochs to warm up' hypothesis directly. Features were reverted; see README.md key findings #5.
